scenarioName: Clear Uptrend High Confidence Buy Recommendation
description: AnalysisHound should identify a Bullish trend and output a high confidence score (>= 0.6) when given an AAPL symbol backed by rising bar data from the stub service.

input.userMessage: Analyse AAPL and provide your market assessment.

expectedBehavior.outputFormat: JSON with symbol, lastPrice, volumeChange, trend, confidenceScore, summary
expectedBehavior.decisionCriteria: Stub returns 3 days of rising prices (148→154→158). AnalysisHound should detect uptrend and output Bullish with confidenceScore >= 0.6.
